mapper.update: UPDATE alliance a SET a.name = CONCAT(a.name, '(原', #{sourceServerId}, '服)') WHERE a.server_id = #{sourceServerId} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT name FROM alliance WHERE server_id = #{targetServerId}) t WHERE t.name = a.name)
UPDATE alliance SET server_id = #{target} WHERE server_id = #{source}
UPDATE chat_message SET server_id = #{target} WHERE server_id = #{source}
UPDATE market_listing SET status = 'cancelled' WHERE server_id = #{serverId} AND status = 'active'
UPDATE player_nation SET server_id = #{target} WHERE server_id = #{source}
UPDATE supply_transport SET server_id = #{target} WHERE server_id = #{source}
